lesson.menu_desc: Talk about your family and home -- possessives + have/has -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- My World -- Family, Home, and Neighborhood
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 2 -- My World

listenings.text: Hi Erica, this is Sofia. I want to tell you about my family and my home. I live in a small apartment in Pinheiros. My apartment has two bedrooms and a nice kitchen. I live with my husband and my daughter. My daughter is twelve years old. Our neighborhood is quiet and very green. There is a park near our building, and my parents live near us too. On weekends, we walk in the park together. I really love my neighborhood. See you soon!

Hello, my name is Bruno. Let me tell you about my family. I have a big family. I have two brothers and one sister. My parents live in a house in Sao Paulo. Their house is near a small market. My sister has two children, and they are very happy kids. Every Sunday, we have lunch together at my parents house. My home is always full of people. Family is very important to me.

extra_audio.text: First, say you have a family. Second, say who is in your family. Third, say where you live. Fourth, describe your neighborhood. Fifth, say your parents live near you.
